questions.question: Explain the time complexity of the brute force approach for solving the Travelling Salesman Problem using Exhaustive Search. How does it relate to the number of cities (n) in the problem?
questions.hint: Consider the number of permutations of cities

questions.question: What are the key steps involved in implementing the Exhaustive Search algorithm for the Travelling Salesman Problem? Describe each step with an example and its time complexity.
questions.hint: Focus on generating all permutations of city pairs

questions.question: Compare and contrast the Exhaustive Search algorithm with other brute force approaches for solving the Travelling Salesman Problem. What are the advantages and disadvantages of each approach?
questions.hint: Consider trade-offs between time and space complexity
